pages.text: The first gate of the Path of Artifice. The crucible writes a $(l)base aspect$() to gear by combining 4 catalysts.

pages.title: How it works
pages.text: 1. $(l)Right-click$() the crucible with eligible gear → loaded into slot 0.$(br)2. $(l)Right-click$() with each $(l)Catalyst$() → loaded into slots 1-4.$(br)3. With all 4 catalysts placed, $(l)right-click empty-handed$() → ignite.$(br)4. The 4 catalysts resolve into 1 of $(l)24 named aspects$() and write to gear NBT. Gear ejects on top.

pages.title: 6 Catalysts
pages.text: $(c)Inferno$() — fire$(br)$(b)Abyss$() — water$(br)$(6)Bedrock$() — earth$(br)$(a)Tempest$() — wind$(br)$(e)Spirit$() — soul/light$(br)$(5)Void$() — entropy$(br2)Each catalyst is craftable; combine 4 to choose your aspect.

pages.title: 24 Aspects = 6 Pure + 18 Dual
pages.text: $(l)4× same$() catalyst → 1 of 6 $(l)Pure Aspects$() (e.g. 4 fire = $(c)Inferno Essence$(), $(l)+20%$() damage).$(br2)$(l)3+1$() (with affinity) → 1 of 18 $(l)Dual Aspects$() (e.g. 3 fire + 1 wind = $(c)Pyroclasm$(), $(l)+15%$() damage).$(br2)$(l)Other patterns$() (2+2, 2+1+1, ...) → $(7)Indeterminate$() (no offset). Be precise!

pages.title: Affinity Table (Dual Aspects)
pages.text: Each dominant element has $(l)3 sympathetic accents$():$(br)$(c)Fire$() → Wind/Earth/Void$(br)$(b)Water$() → Earth/Wind/Spirit$(br)$(6)Earth$() → Fire/Water/Spirit$(br)$(a)Wind$() → Fire/Water/Void$(br)$(e)Spirit$() → Water/Earth/Void$(br)$(5)Void$() → Fire/Wind/Spirit$(br2)Non-sympathetic 3+1 → Indeterminate.

pages.title: Cancellation
pages.text: $(l)Sneak + right-click empty-handed$() → cancel and drop everything (gear + any catalysts placed). Useful if you change your mind before igniting.$(br2)Once $(l)ignited$(): the aspect is permanent. Choose with care.
